description: The flight search results page updates its loading status, showing progress across different providers and finishing the initial search.
frame_description: The search results page shows a loading bar and status messages like 'Checked 25 of 26 providers' and 'Searching Singapore Airlines...'

description: User waits for the flight search results to fully load, keeping the cursor stationary on the right side of the screen.
User scrolls down the search results page to view more flight options, specifically moving past the initial 'Best' and 'Cheapest' results.
User pauses to examine the flight results for Qatar Airways and other airlines after scrolling down, with the cursor hovering near the 'Select' buttons.
